thesis: Strictly screened short-duration Polymarket 95-98.5c positions may earn carry only if tail losses remain bounded after costs.
null_hypothesis: Net carry is not robust, is consumed by low-frequency tail losses or resolution disputes, or available data cannot characterize the tail.
public_summary: Read-only Gamma and Data API access can reconstruct recent trade sequences, but the survivor-bias gate was not satisfied in the private probe because no 0.95-0.99 priced losing settlement sample was found in the checked recent losing-outcome sample. No carry backtest was run.
public_data_policy: No raw market cache, transaction list, edge estimate, PnL, or private result is stored in this public repository.
verdict_policy: Do not run a Polymarket carry backtest unless the candidate set includes losing settlements that previously traded in the 0.95-0.99 range.
Decision prices must be reconstructed from trades at or before the decision timestamp.
Settlement outcomes may be used for PnL only, never for sample selection.
Funding is N/A for unlevered cash prediction-market positions; gas, slippage, binary hold-to-resolution risk, and tail clustering must be disclosed.
